args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%get me bodied%' AND (lower(artist) LIKE '%beyonce%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%beyoncé%');

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%get me bodied%' AND (lower(artist) LIKE '%beyonce%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%beyoncé%');

args.query: SELECT track_id, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd_sum, COUNT(*) AS sales_count FROM sales WHERE country = 'Canada' AND store = 'Apple Music' AND track_id IN (4233, 12954, 15158) GROUP BY track_id;

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd_sum, COUNT(*) AS sales_count FROM sales WHERE country = 'Canada' AND store = 'Apple Music' AND track_id IN (4233, 12954, 15158) GROUP BY track_id;
